headline: THREE ROLES, ZERO OVERLAP
subheading: Decode how QP, RP and RPi duties differ across the UK pharma supply chain.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial background evoking three distinct pharmaceutical accountability roles along a single supply chain, abstract and conceptual. Three separate luminous glass nodes or sealed checkpoints sit in a clean horizontal row along a glowing connective pathway, each node visually distinct to suggest three separate legal responsibilities that never merge: one node a softly glowing batch-certification seal, one a temperature-controlled distribution waypoint, one a verified import gateway at a subtle border threshold. Deep navy backdrop with cool teal and cyan light tracing the supply-chain line between the nodes, a single fresh-green accent glow marking one verified checkpoint. Softly blurred amber and clear vials and crisp abstract documentation panels recede into shallow depth of field, immaculate reflective surfaces, sterile yet warm cinematic lighting, premium and considered, generous negative space on the left for overlaid text, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
